Skip to contents
EmStanS 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Tutorials
    • getting-started
    • specifying-manual-cut-scores
    • bootstrapping

    getting-started

    getting-started.Rmd

    EmStanS

    Overview

    This package aims to support Embedded Standard Setting, calculating counts and weights.

    Install 

    devtools::install_github("sooyongl/EmStanS", dependencies = T)

    Usage 

    library(EmStanS)
    # data <- read.csv(filePath)
fake_data <- genFakeDataSet(ngca = 3, 
               cor_val = 0.2,
               n = 30,
               nlevel = 3,
               ntable = 5,
               npanelist = 5,
               sdinp = 1,
               ecinp = 0,
               100,300)
#> New names:
#> New names:
#> • `score` -> `score...1`
#> • `freq` -> `freq...2`
#> • `Grade` -> `Grade...3`
#> • `score` -> `score...4`
#> • `freq` -> `freq...5`
#> • `Grade` -> `Grade...6`



fake_data
#> $setup
#> # A tibble: 3 × 7
#>   GCA   `Content Area` `Grade Group` `Number of Tables per Room` `Level Options`
#>   <chr> <chr>          <chr>         <chr>                       <chr>          
#> 1 M1    Math           1             5                           Level1, Level2…
#> 2 M2    Math           2             5                           Level1, Level2…
#> 3 M3    Math           3             5                           Level1, Level2…
#> # ℹ 2 more variables: SD <dbl>, EC <dbl>
#> 
#> $panelist
#> # A tibble: 75 × 3
#>   GCA   Panelist Table
#>   <chr> <chr>    <chr>
#> 1 M1    M1.T1.1  T1   
#> 2 M1    M1.T1.2  T1   
#> 3 M1    M1.T1.3  T1   
#> 4 M1    M1.T1.4  T1   
#> 5 M1    M1.T1.5  T1   
#> # ℹ 70 more rows
#> 
#> $rating
#> # A tibble: 2,250 × 8
#>   GCA   Subject Grade Round Table Panelist Item_ID ALD   
#>   <chr> <chr>   <chr> <dbl> <chr> <chr>    <chr>   <chr> 
#> 1 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_1    Level1
#> 2 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_2    Level1
#> 3 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_3    Level1
#> 4 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_4    Level2
#> 5 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_5    Level2
#> # ℹ 2,245 more rows
#> 
#> $item_data
#> # A tibble: 90 × 6
#>   GCA   Item_ID Total_points Point Order_of_Difficulty Loc_RP50
#>   <chr> <chr>          <dbl> <dbl>               <int>    <dbl>
#> 1 M1    M1_1               1     1                   1     102.
#> 2 M1    M1_2               1     1                   2     107.
#> 3 M1    M1_3               1     1                   3     110.
#> 4 M1    M1_4               1     1                   4     113.
#> 5 M1    M1_5               1     1                   5     116.
#> # ℹ 85 more rows
#> 
#> $examineedata_data
#> # A tibble: 226 × 9
#>   score...1 freq...2 Grade...3 score...4 freq...5 Grade...6 score...7 freq...8
#>       <int>    <int> <chr>         <int>    <int> <chr>         <int>    <int>
#> 1        86        6 M1              113       10 M2              126        8
#> 2        87        6 M1              114        2 M2              127        7
#> 3        88        2 M1              115        3 M2              128        5
#> 4        89        4 M1              116        4 M2              129        5
#> 5        90        6 M1              117        7 M2              130        6
#> # ℹ 221 more rows
#> # ℹ 1 more variable: Grade...9 <chr>

# Or you can use your own data structured by the following table.
    res <- emstans(data = fake_data,
               tests = c(1,2),
               targets = "ALD",
               WESS = T,
               gamest = F,
               median = "modal",
               loc = "Loc_RP50",
               domain = "GCA")

    Summary 

    summary(res)
#> ESS output
#> ----------
#> Individual Cut:
#> # A tibble: 50 × 16
#>    GCA    Table Panelist Correlation  L2_p  L3_p L2_loc L3_loc  L2_C  L2_W  L3_C
#>    <fct>  <chr> <chr>          <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#>  1 M1-All T1    M1.T1.1        0.165    10    25   158    248.     8 524      10
#>  2 M1-All T1    M1.T1.2        0.131    12    25   164.   248.    17 729.     10
#>  3 M1-All T1    M1.T1.3        0.284    12    21   164.   238.    11 491.     13
#>  4 M1-All T1    M1.T1.4        0.248    12    23   164.   247.     9 490.     10
#>  5 M1-All T1    M1.T1.5        0.224    13    21   178.   238.    11 427      15
#>  6 M1-All T2    M1.T2.1        0.173     5    16   116.   193.     7 330.     13
#>  7 M1-All T2    M1.T2.2        0.24      8    22   139.   239.    11 444.     11
#>  8 M1-All T2    M1.T2.3        0.154     2    20   107.   236.     1   3.5    16
#>  9 M1-All T2    M1.T2.4        0.374    10    27   158    267.     8 343.      8
#> 10 M1-All T2    M1.T2.5        0.336     9    30   139.   296.     9 391       2
#>     L3_W L_sum LW_sum num_item total_item
#>    <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>    <dbl>      <dbl>
#>  1 392.     18   916.       30         60
#>  2 315.     27  1044.       30         60
#>  3 465.     24   956.       30         60
#>  4 483.     19   973        30         60
#>  5 625.     26  1052.       30         60
#>  6 633.     20   964.       30         60
#>  7 422.     22   866.       30         60
#>  8 739.     17   743.       30         60
#>  9 286.     16   629.       30         60
#> 10  47.8    11   439.       30         60
#> # ℹ 40 more rows
#> 
#> Meidan Cut:
#> # A tibble: 12 × 6
#>    GCA    Table  L2_p L2_loc  L3_p L3_loc
#>    <fct>  <chr> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>
#>  1 M1-All T1       12   164.    23   247.
#>  2 M1-All T2        8   139.    22   239.
#>  3 M1-All T3        6   131.    23   247.
#>  4 M1-All T4       13   178.    27   267.
#>  5 M1-All T5        8   139.    22   239.
#>  6 M1-All All       9   139.    23   247.
#>  7 M2-All T1        7   145.    23   264.
#>  8 M2-All T2        9   151.    22   260.
#>  9 M2-All T3        9   151.    24   269 
#> 10 M2-All T4       12   185.    26   286.
#> # ℹ 2 more rows
#> 
#> Modal Cut:
#> # A tibble: 12 × 15
#>    GCA    Table Correlation  L2_p  L3_p L2_loc L3_loc  L2_C  L2_W  L3_C  L3_W
#>    <fct>  <chr>       <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#>  1 M1-All T1          0.297    10    21   158    238.     9  428     13 464. 
#>  2 M1-All T2          0.446     8    27   139.   267.     9  276.     8 185  
#>  3 M1-All T3          0.408     3    18   110.   206      3  128.     9 421. 
#>  4 M1-All T4          0.353    16    27   193.   267.     9  461.     4 232  
#>  5 M1-All T5          0.403     5    19   116.   220.     7  172.    12 486  
#>  6 M1-All All         0.55      5    26   116.   254.     7  154.     6 127. 
#>  7 M2-All T1          0.55      6    23   143.   264.     7  108.     5 271. 
#>  8 M2-All T2          0.229     7    23   145.   264.     7  359.    10 504. 
#>  9 M2-All T3          0.367     5    25   141.   273.     5  127.     7 336  
#> 10 M2-All T4          0.235    14    29   189.   310.    15  725.     2   9.2
#>    L_sum LW_sum num_item total_item
#>    <dbl>  <dbl>    <dbl>      <dbl>
#>  1    22   892.       30         60
#>  2    17   461.       30         60
#>  3    12   549.       30         60
#>  4    13   693.       30         60
#>  5    19   658.       30         60
#>  6    13   281.       30         60
#>  7    12   379.       30         60
#>  8    17   863.       30         60
#>  9    12   463.       30         60
#> 10    17   734.       30         60
#> # ℹ 2 more rows
#> 
#> Average Cut:
#> # A tibble: 12 × 6
#>    GCA    Table  L2_p L2_loc  L3_p L3_loc
#>    <fct>  <chr> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>
#>  1 M1-All T1       12   166.    23   244.
#>  2 M1-All T2        8   132.    22   246.
#>  3 M1-All T3        6   134.    21   231.
#>  4 M1-All T4       13   170.    20   249.
#>  5 M1-All T5        8   138.    22   228.
#>  6 M1-All All       9   148.    22   240.
#>  7 M2-All T1        7   147.    23   272.
#>  8 M2-All T2        9   152.    22   255.
#>  9 M2-All T3        9   156.    24   269.
#> 10 M2-All T4       14   190.    27   293.
#> # ℹ 2 more rows
#> 
#> More details can be extacted using the `extract()` function

    Report

    With what = "all", the combined report is provided.

    Individual 

    report(res, what = "individual")
    Individual Summary
    Group Summary: Mode
    Group Summary: Median
    Group Summary: Average

    Detailed 

    report(res, what = "detailed")
    • M1-All
    • M2-All
    • Table
    • Plot
    • Crosstab
    • Summary
    Plot data
    Cross Tab
    Aligned ALD
    . .. Level1 Level2 Level3 Total
    Operational Level Level1 1
    3.3%         		3
    10%     		0
    0%     		4
    13.3%
    Level2 4
    13.3%     		14
    46.7%         		3
    10%     		21
    70%
    Level3 0
    0%     		3
    10%     		2
    6.7%         		5
    16.7%
    Total 5
    16.7%     		20
    66.7%     		5
    16.7%     		30
    100%
    Cross Tab Effect
    Aligned ALD
    . .. Level1 Level2 Level3 Total
    Operational Level Level1 1
    3.3%         		3
    10%     		0
    0%     		4
    13.3%
    Level2 4
    13.3%     		14
    46.7%         		3
    10%     		21
    70%
    Level3 0
    0%     		3
    10%     		2
    6.7%         		5
    16.7%
    Total 5
    16.7%     		20
    66.7%     		5
    16.7%     		30
    100%
    Freq Perc
    Agree 17 57%
    Disagree 13 43%
    Adjacent Disagreement 13 43%
    Discrepant Disagreement 0 0%
    Weighted Kappa 0.32

    Agree 21 70%
    Disagree 9 30%

    Weighted Kappa 0.31

    Summary 

    report(res, what = "summary")
    • All
    • Table
    • Plot
    GCA . Level1 Level2 Level3
    M1-All OIB Page 1-4 5-25 26-30
    Cut Scores 116.2 254.5
    Percent in Level 13.7% 61.3% 25%
    Percent at or Above Level 100% 86.3% 25%
    Percent Below Level 13.7% 75%
    M2-All OIB Page 1-3 4-27 28-30
    Cut Scores 135 309.2
    Percent in Level 9.9% 82.5% 7.7%
    Percent at or Above Level 100% 90.1% 7.7%
    Percent Below Level 9.9% 92.3%

    Item Review 

    report(res, what = "review")
    • M1-All
    • M2-All

    Extract

    extract() provides the primary results of ESS as a form of list().

    extract(res)
#> $Individual
#> $Individual$individual_cut
#> # A tibble: 50 × 16
#>   GCA    Table Panelist Correlation  L2_p  L3_p L2_loc L3_loc  L2_C  L2_W  L3_C
#>   <fct>  <chr> <chr>          <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#> 1 M1-All T1    M1.T1.1        0.165    10    25   158    248.     8  524     10
#> 2 M1-All T1    M1.T1.2        0.131    12    25   164.   248.    17  729.    10
#> 3 M1-All T1    M1.T1.3        0.284    12    21   164.   238.    11  491.    13
#> 4 M1-All T1    M1.T1.4        0.248    12    23   164.   247.     9  490.    10
#> 5 M1-All T1    M1.T1.5        0.224    13    21   178.   238.    11  427     15
#> # ℹ 45 more rows
#> # ℹ 5 more variables: L3_W <dbl>, L_sum <dbl>, LW_sum <dbl>, num_item <dbl>,
#> #   total_item <dbl>
#> 
#> $Individual$median_cut
#> # A tibble: 12 × 6
#>   GCA    Table  L2_p L2_loc  L3_p L3_loc
#>   <fct>  <chr> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>
#> 1 M1-All T1       12   164.    23   247.
#> 2 M1-All T2        8   139.    22   239.
#> 3 M1-All T3        6   131.    23   247.
#> 4 M1-All T4       13   178.    27   267.
#> 5 M1-All T5        8   139.    22   239.
#> # ℹ 7 more rows
#> 
#> $Individual$modal_cut
#> # A tibble: 12 × 15
#>   GCA    Table Correlation  L2_p  L3_p L2_loc L3_loc  L2_C  L2_W  L3_C  L3_W
#>   <fct>  <chr>       <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#> 1 M1-All T1          0.297    10    21   158    238.     9  428     13  464.
#> 2 M1-All T2          0.446     8    27   139.   267.     9  276.     8  185 
#> 3 M1-All T3          0.408     3    18   110.   206      3  128.     9  421.
#> 4 M1-All T4          0.353    16    27   193.   267.     9  461.     4  232 
#> 5 M1-All T5          0.403     5    19   116.   220.     7  172.    12  486 
#> # ℹ 7 more rows
#> # ℹ 4 more variables: L_sum <dbl>, LW_sum <dbl>, num_item <dbl>,
#> #   total_item <dbl>
#> 
#> $Individual$average_cut
#> # A tibble: 12 × 6
#>   GCA    Table  L2_p L2_loc  L3_p L3_loc
#>   <fct>  <chr> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>
#> 1 M1-All T1       12   166.    23   244.
#> 2 M1-All T2        8   132.    22   246.
#> 3 M1-All T3        6   134.    21   231.
#> 4 M1-All T4       13   170.    20   249.
#> 5 M1-All T5        8   138.    22   228.
#> # ℹ 7 more rows
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed
#> $Detailed$summary_table
#> $Detailed$summary_table[[1]]
#> $Detailed$summary_table[[1]][[1]]
#>      GCA Table Correlation       L2_p        L3_p   L2_C  L2_W   L3_C  L3_W
#> 1 M1-All   All        0.55 5\n(116.2) 26\n(254.5) 7 / 30 154.2 6 / 30 127.2
#>     L_sum LW_sum
#> 1 13 / 60  281.4
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed$summary_table[[2]]
#> $Detailed$summary_table[[2]][[1]]
#>      GCA Table Correlation     L2_p        L3_p   L2_C  L2_W   L3_C  L3_W
#> 1 M2-All   All        0.39 4\n(135) 28\n(309.2) 5 / 30 122.7 4 / 30 150.1
#>    L_sum LW_sum
#> 1 9 / 60  272.8
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed$cutscore_table
#> $Detailed$cutscore_table[[1]]
#> $Detailed$cutscore_table[[1]][[1]]
#> # A tibble: 30 × 11
#>   GCA    Round Item_ID   OOD Loc_RP50 ALD     L2_C  L3_C  L2_W  L3_W
#>   <fct>  <dbl> <chr>   <int>    <dbl> <chr>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#> 1 M1-All     1 M1_1        1     102. Level1     5    25  194. 1975.
#> 2 M1-All     1 M1_2        2     107. Level2     4    24  173  1847.
#> 3 M1-All     1 M1_3        3     110. Level2     5    23  162. 1767.
#> 4 M1-All     1 M1_4        4     113. Level2     6    22  158. 1714.
#> 5 M1-All     1 M1_5        5     116. Level1     7    21  154. 1641.
#> # ℹ 25 more rows
#> # ℹ 1 more variable: Operational_Lv <chr>
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed$cutscore_table[[2]]
#> $Detailed$cutscore_table[[2]][[1]]
#> # A tibble: 30 × 11
#>   GCA    Round Item_ID   OOD Loc_RP50 ALD     L2_C  L3_C  L2_W  L3_W
#>   <fct>  <dbl> <chr>   <int>    <dbl> <chr>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#> 1 M2-All     1 M2_1        1     128. Level1     4    27  136. 2033.
#> 2 M2-All     1 M2_2        2     129. Level2     3    26  135. 2017.
#> 3 M2-All     1 M2_3        3     135. Level2     4    25  123  1872.
#> 4 M2-All     1 M2_4        4     135  Level2     5    24  123. 1865 
#> 5 M2-All     1 M2_5        5     141. Level2     6    23  123. 1729.
#> # ℹ 25 more rows
#> # ℹ 1 more variable: Operational_Lv <chr>
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[1]]
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[1]][[1]]
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[1]][[1]][[1]]
#>            Level1      Level2     Level3      Total
#> Level1  1<br>3.3%    3<br>10%    0<br>0% 4<br>13.3%
#> Level2 4<br>13.3% 14<br>46.7%   3<br>10%  21<br>70%
#> Level3    0<br>0%    3<br>10%  2<br>6.7% 5<br>16.7%
#> Total  5<br>16.7% 20<br>66.7% 5<br>16.7% 30<br>100%
#> 
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[1]][[1]][[2]]
#>       name values perc
#> 1    Agree  17.00  57%
#> 2 Disagree  13.00  43%
#> 3  Adj_dis  13.00  43%
#> 4 Disc_dis   0.00   0%
#> 5   Wkappa   0.32     
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[2]]
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[2]][[1]]
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[2]][[1]][[1]]
#>            Level1      Level2    Level3      Total
#> Level1  1<br>3.3%   2<br>6.7%   0<br>0%   3<br>10%
#> Level2   3<br>10% 19<br>63.3% 2<br>6.7%  24<br>80%
#> Level3    0<br>0%   2<br>6.7% 1<br>3.3%   3<br>10%
#> Total  4<br>13.3% 23<br>76.7%  3<br>10% 30<br>100%
#> 
#> $Detailed$crosstab_table[[2]][[1]][[2]]
#>       name values perc
#> 1    Agree  21.00  70%
#> 2 Disagree   9.00  30%
#> 3  Adj_dis   9.00  30%
#> 4 Disc_dis   0.00   0%
#> 5   Wkappa   0.31     
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed$gam_fit
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[1]]
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[1]][[1]]
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[1]][[1]]$gam_value
#> # A tibble: 60 × 4
#>   Loc_RP50 Inconsistency    se `Cut Level`
#>      <dbl>         <dbl> <dbl> <chr>      
#> 1     102.          192. 1.71  L2_W       
#> 2     108.          171. 0.911 L2_W       
#> 3     115.          154. 1.16  L2_W       
#> 4     122.          147. 1.18  L2_W       
#> 5     128.          148. 1.00  L2_W       
#> # ℹ 55 more rows
#> 
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[1]][[1]]$gam_fit
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[1]][[1]]$gam_fit[[1]]
#> 
#> Family: gaussian 
#> Link function: identity 
#> 
#> Formula:
#> L2_W ~ s(Loc_RP50, k = 10)
#> 
#> Estimated degrees of freedom:
#> 8.87  total = 9.87 
#> 
#> GCV score: 5.707632     
#> 
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[1]][[1]]$gam_fit[[2]]
#> 
#> Family: gaussian 
#> Link function: identity 
#> 
#> Formula:
#> L3_W ~ s(Loc_RP50, k = 10)
#> 
#> Estimated degrees of freedom:
#> 8.87  total = 9.87 
#> 
#> GCV score: 5.707632     
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[2]]
#> $Detailed$gam_fit[[2]][[1]]
